name: Hickory Swing Golf Course
about: Hickory Swing Golf Course is an 18-hole, par-60 executive course located in Great Falls, MT, spanning 86 acres. The facility offers a driving range, practice green with sand trap, and PGA-certified instruction. For indoor play, the venue features a golf simulator accessible for tee times daily. The clubhouse provides a variety of amenities, including club rentals, repair services, and food and beverage options. The PXG club fitting service offers an immersive experience with access to high-end components and professional guidance for golfers looking to optimize their equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round simulator access with over 30,000 virtual courses available
PXG professional club fitting with top-tier performance tracking technology
Comprehensive practice facilities including a driving range and practice green
On-site food, beverages, and club rentals enhance convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks and beverages available at the clubhouse
No mention of alcohol service available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, PXG club rentals are available at the venue for those who do not have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The clubhouse offers snacks and beverages for purchase, but BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The duration for 18 simulator holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is welcoming to families and offers a relaxed atmosphere suitable for junior golfers.
